**Commit**: ci: add result capture workflows to store CI output in repository

- Add store-results.yml: captures artifacts and results from CI runs
- Add capture-logs.yml: detailed workflow logging
- Enhance ci.yml: capture test output for analysis
- Results stored in .github/ci-results/ for easy access
- Allows Claude to read CI errors and logs directly from git

This enables:
- Direct access to test output and build logs
- Artifact storage in repository
- Historical CI run results
- No API access required
